prompt:
Create a dreamy premium anime-style café illustration of a realistic Japanese kakigori dessert in a lavender moonlight theme. Canvas is vertical 3:4, softly backlit by large sunlit windows with sheer curtains, pastel lilac hydrangeas and lavender flowers, glass vases, sparkling bokeh, and a refined Japanese dessert café atmosphere. In the center foreground, place a large faceted clear glass bowl on a saucer, filled with a tall mound of shaved ice colored in layered pastel pink, pale lavender, deep violet, and translucent icy blue syrup. The dessert has exactly 4 prominent decorative toppings: 1 lavender ice cream scoop on top, 1 translucent crystal shard cluster near the scoop, 1 pink star ornament on the front upper-left area, and 1 white snowflake ornament on the front lower-right area; surround the base with many blue crystal jelly pieces and sparkling sugar crystals. Add a small gold spoon on the saucer. Behind the dessert sits an elegant young woman in a lavender lace camisole dress with ribbon shoulder straps, short wavy purple-gray bob hair with a braided side detail, delicate hands posed near the bowl, and a soft romantic posture; obscure her entire face with a centered opaque square gradient mask from muted purple at the top to pale pink at the bottom, leaving hair, ears, neck, shoulders, and hands visible. On the left foreground, place a standing menu card with ornate thin lavender border and readable Japanese text using 雪月氷菓
SETSUGETSU HYOKA
月光のラベンダー氷
〜星屑のきらめき〜
・ラベンダーシロップ
・バタフライピージュレ
・ミルクエスプーマ
・ホワイトチョコスノー
・パールクラッシュ
・星型の琥珀糖
¥2,200（税込）
月明かりを閉じ込めたような
やさしい甘さと香りの無糖氷; the card contains exactly 6 bullet items. In the background, include a vertical wall sign with the café logo and Japanese café name 雪月茶寮. Use a luminous pastel palette of lavender, blush pink, icy blue, and warm white, with high detail, translucent ice texture, glossy glass reflections, magical sparkles, soft depth of field, and an elegant premium dessert photography composition blended with polished anime illustration. Avoid extra people, avoid additional menu items, avoid watermark, and keep all visible typography clean and café-like.
